modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a casual conversational tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be several noticeable typos and some redundant repeated information.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Need a quote to upgrade Stata software from SE13 to SE15

full_description_text:  
I have Stata/SE13 and I wanna upgrade to Stata/SE15. Can I please get a quote for upgrading to Stata/MP 16 (2-core) and also for the Prof+ Plan upgrades from Stata/SE 15? Just looking for some info on that, thanks!
